instruction: Evaluate the iterated integral: integral_0^{b} integral_0^{a} xy dx dy. Use Fubini's theorem to evaluate as an iterated integral.
steps: Integrate with respect to x first: integral_0^{a} xy dx = {a}^2 y/2.
Then with respect to y: integral_0^{b} {a}^2 y/2 dy = {a2}{b2}/4 = {answer_double_int_xy230}.
